rationale: Delete command spec requires hint in deletes array; driver serialized it as top-level field. New CRUD spec tests caught this.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1476 + Improvement type; proactive spec-rollout, driver not doing anything wrong.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1437 + Improvement type; proactive spec-rollout to change estimatedDocumentCount implementation.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1505 + Improvement type; test failure for stable API support, proactive spec rollout.
Internal refactor to use Timestamp Ord for ClusterTime; completing a TODO, no behavior change.
CRUD spec requires operations to inherit collection-level read concern and selection criteria; find failed to do so.
Deadlock when retrying with full connection pool; implementation bug, no specific spec rule mandating connection release before retry.
Dependency replacement from linked-hash-map to indexmap; internal implementation change, no spec involvement.
Serialization bug sending null for None options; implementation detail, no specific spec rule about null-field serialization behavior.
Adding a new serde helper for ObjectId hex deserialization; feature addition, no spec nonconformance.
MongoDB create command field is 'validator'; driver used 'validation' (likely a typo). Go driver mentioned confirming correct name.
Internal refactor migrating compat::u2f module to serde helper; no behavior change.
Error/ErrorKind struct too large on stack; performance/ergonomics improvement, no spec involvement.
Changing i64 to u64 for always-positive count fields; API type change, no spec behavior change.
Changing WriteConcern::validate visibility to pub(crate); internal API change, no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1649 + Improvement; proactive stable API field name update, not a prior bug.
Fixing race condition in pool-clear-min-size.yml test file; Issue split from DRIVERS-1726, test infrastructure fix.
API ergonomics improvement using enums for collation options; Java mentioned as model, but Rust API guidelines are the primary motivation.
Changing TlsOptions path type from String to PathBuf; API ergonomics per Rust API guidelines, no spec behavior.
Removing optional waitQueueTimeoutMS because CSOT supersedes it; spec marks it optional, no nonconformance.
Removing re-exports of unstable dependency types from public API; internal API stability change.
Meta-ticket for ensuring API follows Rust API Guidelines; no spec behavior involvement.
Accepting impl AsRef<str> instead of &str for API flexibility; ergonomics improvement per Rust API guidelines.
Standardizing ObjectId constructor naming (with_bytes → from_bytes); API naming convention, no spec behavior.
DateTime silently loses sub-millisecond precision in BSON; BSON spec defines ms precision but doesn't mandate error vs. silent truncation.
Renaming StreamAddress to ServerAddress for accuracy; Java/C#/Swift mentioned for consistency, but primary reason is naming accuracy.
Rotating Atlas dev testing credentials; CI/infra task, Issue split from DRIVERS-1732.
Truncating chrono::DateTime to millisecond precision when converting to bson::DateTime; conversion behavior, not spec-mandated error path.
Panic on large BSON datetime value due to chrono overflow; should return error; implementation safety bug, no spec rule on this edge case.
ISO-8601 format not correctly followed in serde helpers; Swift Foundation class used to verify, not a MongoDB driver comparison.
ObjectId::to_hex ownership change per Rust API guidelines for Copy types; no spec behavior change.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1770 + Improvement; reducing default max_pool_size from 100; proactive spec-rollout, not a prior bug.
Adding easier access to inner field of bson::DateTime; API ergonomics feature request from users.
Error labels spec requires labels at top-level command response only; driver incorrectly nested them in WriteConcernError and BulkWrite.
Buffering socket reads/writes with BufWriter/BufReader for performance; internal optimization, no spec behavior change.
Race condition causing intermittent test failures in DNS seedlist discovery tests; CI flakiness, not a spec behavioral issue.
Performance improvement for bson::DateTime::now(); empty description, performance-only change.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1793 + Improvement; bumping maxWireVersion for MongoDB 5.0, proactive version support.
Memory safety bug: Decimal128 deserialization allows viewing uninitialized data; security/safety bug, not a BSON spec conformance issue.
Renaming ServerApiVersion::Version1 to V1 for brevity; spec uses 'v1' string but doesn't mandate Rust enum variant names.
CVE-2021-20332: credentials leaked via CMAP PoolCreated events; security vulnerability, CMAP spec doesn't explicitly forbid extra fields.
CMAP spec defines only max_pool_size/min_pool_size/max_idle_time in PoolCreatedEvent; driver included extra fields like TlsOptions.
Redacting Credential::Debug to prevent credential leakage; security hardening, no spec behavior.
Collection still has default Document generic argument accidentally left from RUST-735; API consistency fix.
Builder API breaking change after dependency upgrade; API usability fix, no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1483 + Improvement; adding test for WaitQueue eviction error retryability, proactive test work.
BSON spec defines reserved subtype range (0x07-0x7F) distinct from UserDefined (0x80+); driver misclassified reserved as UserDefined.
Unifying Display/Debug for Bson type to use driver names instead of shell names; cosmetic API consistency change.
CMAP spec requires connection pools to be created and marked ready for any server in direct connection mode; driver did not do this.
Fixing race condition in pool-clear-clears-waitqueue.yml test file; Issue split from DRIVERS-1727, test infrastructure fix.
